untranslatable_reason: Exhaustion Gap pattern requires multi-bar trend analysis to identify the true midway point of a price move and directional context. The pattern definition references 'midway point of a price move' which requires lookback analysis to measure prior trend length—not available via single-bar indicator conditions. Gap direction alone (entry conditions converted) is insufficient; the 'exhaustion' characteristic requires measuring prior move magnitude relative to post-gap continuation, which exceeds available indicator scope.
